description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, clean-lined design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall finishes, with a prominent dark facade at the front and lighter walls on the sides and rear. The roof is a complex gable style, with multiple intersecting sections and a moderate pitch. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, while the rear and side yards are open grassy areas. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light. A driveway leads to a garage on one side, and a covered porch is visible at the front entrance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark front facade, landscaped entry, and intersecting gable roof. Features include large windows, a garage, and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark facade, landscaped entry, paved walkway, and covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a mix of dark and light wall finishes.
description_view_2: Rear view with lighter wall colors, large windows, and open grassy backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, side landscaping, and the transition between dark and light exterior finishes.
